steps.assistant_text: Wave-3: 97.87% -> 150/150 EXACT, retracting the documented 'whole-function first-temp coloring cascade ($f0<->$f8), C-lever-immune, permuter-floored' cap. (1) 0x488 countdown respelled as compound RMW (FW(arg0,0x488)=FW(arg0,0x488)-1; if(FW(...)<0)) -> un-coalesced lw t1/addiu t2/bgez/sw t2 (7B2C recipe). (2) The $f0-vs-$f8 FP residual was the NAMED d1/d2 mul-result locals (named = FP candidate $f0; target = $f8 ring temp): de-named via the assignment-carrier fold `*p1 = *(f32*)((char*)alias(&import,1)+4) * two + *(p1 = (f32*)(chain+0x134));` — the + operator evaluates LEFT-first here, so the call term must be textually first and p1's def rides inside the RHS as an assignment-expr (a separate p1 def statement before the call emits a pre-call addiu + spill, frame -72); `two` stays a named f32 local (mul.s keeper, remats per site as ring mtc1). (3) (elem+1)|0x4D4 |-swap on both D_807FE768 dispatch clusters (right-first | eval, 7E34 rule). ROM cmp clean.
